title: Fix Parameter Preservation on Replan (Remaining Count)
description:
Research Report R2-003 (Confidence 93%, High). When replanning a partially completed goal (e.g., gathered 5/10 logs), the planner restarts with the FULL target count instead of the remaining count. The TargetCount parameter is lost during replan.

Fix: Add a method to compute remaining count (targetCount - currentInventory) and pass it to the new goal instance. Implement for all goals with dynamic targets (GatherWoodGoal, IItemSpecGoal, CraftItemGoal, etc.).

Source: research-MemorySmith.Agent Codebase Audit Sprint-35, Council Addendum 2026-06-26
